LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS DENNIS RING, AND SUSAN ROKISKY-RING AS INDIVIDUALS AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE ROKISKY-RING 2005 TRUSTS' ANTI-SLAPP MOTION [CCP 425.16] IS DENIED. EVEN IF THIS CASE ARISES FROM PROTECTED CONDUCT, PLAINTIFF'S HAVE CARRIED THEIR BURDEN OF PROVING A SUFFICIENT LIKELIHOOD OF PREVAILING AT LEAST ON THEIR THEORY THAT DEFENDANTS LACKED A GOOD FAITH INTENT TO LITIGATE GIVEN EVIDENCE THAT THEIR EFFORTS WERE FOCUSED ON AVOIDING LITIGATION TO PRESERVE THEIR ABILITY TO CONVERT THE PROPERTY TO CONDOMINIUMS. EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. MS. MOSBRUCKER TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR# 4780

Defendants Dennis Ring, And Susan Rokisky-Ring'S Anti-Slapp Motion [Ccp 425.16]
Off Calendar Jul-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CATHY MOSBRUCKER & ATTY. JANE FORAN OF THE MOSBRUCKER & FORAN LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 398-9880 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. MICHAEL K. TCHENG OF THE COLOMBATTO & SIMS LLP, TEL. NO. 391-6182 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS DENNIS RING AND SUSAN ROKISKY-RING AS INDIVIDUALS AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE ROKISKY-RING 2005 TRUSTS' Anti-Slapp Motion [CCP 425.16] IS DENIED. EVEN IF THIS CASE ARISES FROM PROTECTED CONDUCT, PLAINTIFF'S HAVE CARRIED THEIR BURDEN OF PROVING A SUFFICIENT LIKELIHOOD OF PREVAILING AT LEAST ON THEIR THEORY THAT DEFENDANTS LACKED A GOOD FAITH INTENT TO LITIGATE GIVEN EVIDENCE THAT THEIR EFFORTS WERE FOCUSED ON AVOIDING LITIGATION TO PRESERVE THEIR ABILITY TO CONVERT THE PROPERTY TO CONDOMINIUMS. EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. MS. MOSBRUCKER TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR # 4780 = (301/PJB)
